docket_entries.description: COMPLEX LITIGATION - INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. HEARING HELD. THE COURT SETS A MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS (DENNIS, CGC-19-574516) FOR JAN-31-2020 AT 2:30 PM.
